sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19940" key="biko/stomon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βῑκόστομον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n19940.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">opening of a receiving vessel</tr_>, of a still, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:p.224B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.Alch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.224B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
